mapper.select: SELECT 'ROOM' AS TYPE , TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_NO) AS RES_ID , R.EMP_ID AS EMP_ID , E.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM , M.RM_NM AS TITLE , TO_CHAR(R.RM_NO) AS REF_NO , R.RM_RSVT_EXPLN AS EXPLN , CASE WHEN R.APRV_STTS = 'REJECTED' THEN 'REJECTED' WHEN R.APRV_STTS = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 'CONFIRMED' WHEN R.RM_RSVT_APRV_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'WAITING' END AS STTS , TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS "START" , TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS "END" FROM ROOM_RESERVATION R LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON R.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN MEETING_ROOM M ON R.RM_NO = M.RM_NO UNION ALL SELECT 'FIXTURE' AS TYPE , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_NO) AS RES_ID , R.EMP_ID AS EMP_ID , E.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM , F.FIXT_NM AS TITLE , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_NO) AS REF_NO , R.FIXT_RSVT_EXPLN AS EXPLN , CASE WHEN R.APRV_STTS = 'REJECTED' THEN 'REJECTED' WHEN R.APRV_STTS = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 'CONFIRMED' WHEN R.FIXT_RSVT_APRV_DT IS NOT NULL THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE 'WAITING' END AS STTS , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS "START" , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS "END" FROM FIXTURE_RESERVATION R LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON R.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN FIXTURE F ON R.FIXT_NO = F.FIXT_NO

SELECT T.EMP_ID AS "empId" , T.EMP_NM AS "empNm" , T.EMP_JBGD AS "empJbgd" , D.DEPT_NM AS "deptNm" FROM EMPLOYEE ME JOIN EMPLOYEE T ON ME.DEPT_CD = T.DEPT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON T.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE ME.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND T.EMP_JBGD = '팀장' AND T.EMP_STTS = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT RM_NO AS rmNo, RM_NM AS rmNm, RM_PLC AS rmPlc, RM_ACTC_NOPE AS rmActcNope, RM_STTS AS rmStts, TO_CHAR(RM_STTS_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsBgngDt, TO_CHAR(RM_STTS_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsEndDt FROM MEETING_ROOM ORDER BY RM_NO ASC

SELECT F.FIXT_NO AS fixtNo, F.FIXT_CAT AS fixtCat, F.FIXT_NM AS fixtNm, F.FIXT_QTY AS fixtQty, F.FIXT_STTS AS fixtStts, CASE WHEN FM.FIXT_MD_NM IS NOT NULL AND F.ASSET_NO IS NOT NULL THEN FM.FIXT_MD_NM || ' [' || F.ASSET_NO || ']' ELSE FM.FIXT_MD_NM END AS fixtMdNm, F.ASSET_NO AS assetNo, TO_CHAR(F.FIXT_STTS_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsBgngDt, TO_CHAR(F.FIXT_STTS_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsEndDt FROM FIXTURE F LEFT OUTER JOIN FIXTURE_MODEL FM ON F.FIXT_NO = FM.FIXT_NO ORDER BY F.FIXT_CAT, F.FIXT_NO ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ROOM_RESERVATION WHERE RM_NO = #{rmNo} AND (APRV_STTS IS NULL OR APRV_STTS != 'REJECTED') AND (RM_RSVT_BGNG_DT < TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AND RM_RSVT_END_DT > TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{bgngDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))
AND RM_RSVT_NO != #{resId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FIXTURE_RESERVATION WHERE FIXT_NO = #{fixtNo} AND (APRV_STTS IS NULL OR APRV_STTS != 'REJECTED') AND (FIXT_RSVT_BGNG_DT < TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AND FIXT_RSVT_END_DT > TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{bgngDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'))
AND FIXT_RSVT_NO != #{resId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROOM_RESERVATION (RM_RSVT_NO, RM_NO, EMP_ID, RM_RSVT_EXPLN, RM_RSVT_BGNG_DT, RM_RSVT_END_DT, RM_RSVT_APRV_ID) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(RM_RSVT_NO), 0) + 1 FROM ROOM_RESERVATION), #{rmNo}, #{empId}, #{expln}, TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{bgngDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{aprvId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE ROOM_RESERVATION SET RM_NO = #{rmNo}, RM_RSVT_EXPLN = #{expln}, RM_RSVT_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{bgngDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), RM_RSVT_END_DT = TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), RM_RSVT_APRV_ID = #{aprvId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE RM_RSVT_NO = #{resId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FIXTURE_RESERVATION (FIXT_RSVT_NO, FIXT_NO, EMP_ID, FIXT_RSVT_EXPLN, FIXT_RSVT_BGNG_DT, FIXT_RSVT_END_DT, FIXT_RSVT_APRV_ID) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(FIXT_RSVT_NO), 0) + 1 FROM FIXTURE_RESERVATION), #{fixtNo}, #{empId}, #{expln}, TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{bgngDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{aprvId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE FIXTURE_RESERVATION SET FIXT_NO = #{fixtNo}, FIXT_RSVT_EXPLN = #{expln}, FIXT_RSVT_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{bgngDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), FIXT_RSVT_END_DT = TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), FIXT_RSVT_APRV_ID = #{aprvId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE FIXT_RSVT_NO = #{resId}
UPDATE FIXTURE SET FIXT_QTY = FIXT_QTY - 1 WHERE FIXT_NO = #{fixtNo} AND FIXT_QTY > 0
mapper.select: SELECT 'ROOM' AS type , TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_NO) AS resId , TO_CHAR(R.EMP_ID) AS empId , E.EMP_NM AS empNm , M.RM_NM AS title , TO_CHAR(R.RM_NO) AS refNo , R.RM_RSVT_EXPLN AS expln , 'WAITING' AS stts , TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS bgngDt , TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS endDt , NULL AS fixtCat FROM ROOM_RESERVATION R LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON R.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN MEETING_ROOM M ON R.RM_NO = M.RM_NO WHERE R.RM_RSVT_APRV_DT IS NULL AND TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_APRV_ID) = #{empId} UNION ALL SELECT 'FIXTURE' AS type , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_NO) AS resId , TO_CHAR(R.EMP_ID) AS empId , E.EMP_NM AS empNm , F.FIXT_NM AS title , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_NO) AS refNo , R.FIXT_RSVT_EXPLN AS expln , 'WAITING' AS stts , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS bgngDt , TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS endDt , F.FIXT_CAT AS fixtCat FROM FIXTURE_RESERVATION R LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON R.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN FIXTURE F ON R.FIXT_NO = F.FIXT_NO WHERE R.FIXT_RSVT_APRV_DT IS NULL AND TO_CHAR(R.FIXT_RSVT_APRV_ID) = #{empId}

SELECT RM_NO AS rmNo, RM_NM AS rmNm, RM_PLC AS rmPlc, RM_ACTC_NOPE AS rmActcNope, CASE WHEN RM_STTS = '01' THEN '사용가능' WHEN RM_STTS = '02' THEN '사용불가' WHEN RM_STTS = '03' THEN '수리중' WHEN RM_STTS = '04' THEN '용도변경' ELSE '알수없음' END AS rmStts, TO_CHAR(RM_STTS_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsBgngDt, TO_CHAR(RM_STTS_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsEndDt FROM MEETING_ROOM ORDER BY RM_NO ASC

SELECT F.FIXT_NO AS fixtNo, F.FIXT_CAT AS fixtCat, F.FIXT_NM AS fixtNm, F.FIXT_PLC AS fixtPlc, F.FIXT_QTY AS fixtQty, F.FIXT_STTS AS fixtStts, FM.FIXT_MD_NM AS fixtMdNm, F.ASSET_NO AS assetNo, TO_CHAR(F.FIXT_STTS_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsBgngDt, TO_CHAR(F.FIXT_STTS_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS sttsEndDt FROM FIXTURE F LEFT OUTER JOIN FIXTURE_MODEL FM ON F.FIXT_NO = FM.FIXT_NO ORDER BY F.FIXT_CAT, F.FIXT_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEETING_ROOM (RM_NO, RM_NM, RM_PLC, RM_ACTC_NOPE, RM_STTS) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(RM_NO), 0) + 1 FROM MEETING_ROOM), #{rmNm}, #{rmPlc}, #{rmActcNope}, #{rmStts})
mapper.update: UPDATE MEETING_ROOM SET RM_NM = #{rmNm}, RM_PLC = #{rmPlc}, RM_ACTC_NOPE = #{rmActcNope}, RM_STTS = #{rmStts}, RM_STTS_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(#{sttsBgngDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), RM_STTS_END_DT = TO_DATE(#{sttsEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE RM_NO = #{rmNo}

BEGIN UPDATE FIXTURE SET FIXT_CAT = #{fixtCat}, FIXT_NM = #{fixtNm}, FIXT_QTY = #{fixtQty}, FIXT_STTS = #{fixtStts}, ASSET_NO = #{assetNo}, FIXT_STTS_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(#{sttsBgngDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), FIXT_STTS_END_DT = TO_DATE(#{sttsEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE FIXT_NO = #{fixtNo};
MERGE INTO FIXTURE_MODEL M USING DUAL ON (M.FIXT_NO = #{fixtNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET M.FIXT_MD_NM = #{fixtMdNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FIXT_NO, FIXT_MD_NM) VALUES (#{fixtNo}, #{fixtMdNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}); END;
